title: BSCS becomes first named launchpad partner on Cryptool
content_html:
Several established launchpads are now running their pool events directly on Cryptool, and the first named partner is BSCS, a long-running launchpad in the BNB ecosystem.

For the launchpads, Cryptool takes over the work that used to live in spreadsheets: vesting management, refunds, distributions, member communication. For investors, every pool they participate in across these launchpads now lands in one dashboard, with consistent reporting and a single distribution flow.

More launchpad partnerships are in the pipeline and will be announced as they go live.
author: Cryptool
